## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (dev server was **not** running during the build)
- [ ] Ran `npm run gen` after editing any content JSON
- [ ] Checked the change in the browser (light **and** dark mode)
- [ ] Screenshot / GIF added below for visual changes
